Original Persona: An Indian executive director from a non-profit organization focusing on the welfare of low-income families.
Expanded Persona:
Ari Nair (born 1978) is an Indian executive director at a non-profit organization focusing on the welfare of low-income families. They are non-binary and use they/them pronouns. With over two decades of experience in community organizing and policy advocacy, they lead programs addressing housing, food security, and workforce development. They combine strategic leadership with hands-on program work and strong ties to the communities they serve. They are 48 years old and committed to equitable outcomes for marginalized families.
